sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Looking for a bit of meat?

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Meat! We've got all the good stuff here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you have all this meat?

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Some prefer solids to go with their blood. That, and the werewolf visitors need something to eat too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where does it all come from?

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Look around you! There's no shortage of meat in these parts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know what, I think I've heard enough.

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Whatever you say. So, want some meat?

lines.speaker: Lenyig Karna
lines.text: Come back if you ever want some meat!
